name: Is idiopathic fall illness at work compensable per recent Utah case?

mainEntity.name: Is idiopathic fall illness at work compensable per recent Utah case?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes if floor etc. worsened harm.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if work conditions like hard floor worsened injuries, not just risk.[2] Key factors: (1) Internal cause but job aggravates; (2) Prove actual increased harm; (3) Ackley v. Labor Commission.[2] Medical proof essential.[2] Recent clarification helps.

description: Yes if floor etc. worsened harm.[2]
